page.title: Help & Glossary
page.subtitle: Definitions for every score, severity, and metric you'll see in featcat. Hover any ⓘ icon in the UI to peek at the same content inline, then jump here for full context.

sections.quick_links_subtitle: Most support work starts in one of these pages. Open the pages below when a term looks confusing.
sections.how_to_read_body: Each card explains what a term means, where it comes from, and what to do when you need to act on it.
sections.how_to_read_item_1: Higher scores are usually better, but inspect the trend instead of one-off value changes.
sections.how_to_read_item_2: When status changes from warning to critical, check the related feature history before changing monitoring baselines.
sections.how_to_read_item_3: Use the in-page links to jump from a definition back to the dashboard, monitor, and action surfaces.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review feature-store health and recent signals.

monitoring.label: Monitoring
monitoring.description: Inspect drift and quality checks with metric-level detail.

features.label: Feature Browser
features.description: Open feature-level docs, stats, and usage details.

actions.label: Action Items
actions.description: Track pending recommendations and close the loop with outcomes.

audit.label: Audit Log
audit.description: Audit status changes, updates, and recommendation activity.

health_score.where_seen: Dashboard feature cards and feature table badges.
health_score.next_action: Drill into the feature row and check docs coverage, drift checks, and usage activity for concrete causes.

health_grade.where_seen: Feature table, group summary chips, and monitor cards.
health_grade.next_action: Use this as a triage priority, especially when grade moves from A/B to C/D.

quality_score.where_seen: Search ranking, discovery results, and recommendation candidates.
quality_score.next_action: Improve metadata quality (name clarity, tags, and sample stats visibility) to raise discoverability.

completeness.where_seen: Drift checks, monitoring trends, and feature detail quality panel.
completeness.next_action: Compare latest and baseline windows before deciding whether null spikes are expected.

psi.where_seen: Monitoring pages, alert banners, and quality trend cards.
psi.next_action: If PSI remains high after baseline review, inspect feature definition and upstream source changes.

drift_severity.where_seen: Monitoring dashboard chips and action-item sources.
drift_severity.next_action: Use warning to prepare checks, and treat critical as a blocking signal before feature reuse.

monitoring_status.where_seen: Feature detail cards, group cards, and line items in monitoring views.
monitoring_status.next_action: Open recent monitor reports to confirm whether the status is missing baseline or an actual failure.

action_item.where_seen: Actions page and feature-level activity streams.
action_item.next_action: Move from pending to applied only when remediation is verified in code or docs.
